score_evidence.completeness: Score 4: Most of the 20 checklist items present. Checklist review: (1) Conceptual design phase ✓, (2) Architectural design phases ✓, (3) Executive plans ✓, (4) Optional architectural supervision clause — present as Phase 6 Construction Administration but no explicit 'optional' label ✓, (5) Landscape excluded ✓, (6) Structural engineering ✓, (7) Electrical engineering ✓, (8) Lighting design ✓, (9) Water systems ✓, (10) Irrigation — not explicitly mentioned in exclusions or scope (minor gap), (11) Solar systems ✓, (12) Local contractor cost validation — not explicitly planned in SOW (minor gap), (13) Payment schedule ✓ with milestone names, percentages, trigger events ✓, (14) Deliverables per phase ✓, (15) Responsibilities matrix ✓, (16) Exclusions ✓ specific, (17) Revision assumptions ✓ per phase, (18) Timeline ✓, (19) Project-type clauses ✓ commercial_hotel: CH-001 hospitality compliance, CH-002 brand standards, CH-003 MIA, CH-004 hydrologic setback, CH-005 IP rights ✓, (20) E-signature path — not defined (gap). Items 10, 12, 20 are weak or absent — scoring 4 (17-19 items present).
score_evidence.accuracy: Deliverables per phase match production pipeline exactly. commercial_hotel template correctly applied with 5 project-type-specific clauses. Responsibilities matrix names real parties. Hydrologic setback clause (CH-004) is particularly well-crafted for TC-008 context.
score_evidence.clarity: Client can sign this document with full understanding. All six phases clearly defined. Exclusions are specific and comprehensive. Payment milestones tied to named DG gates.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 per simulated run rule — no live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: SOW produced after area program and cost basis. Available before DG-04.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Architect reviewer can approve or flag specific sections immediately. DG-04 approves with no comment — indicates no flags found.

auto_fail_notes: Payment schedule present ✓. Exclusions section present ✓. commercial_hotel project type template applied ✓. No auto-fail conditions triggered. Minor gap on irrigation exclusion and e-signature path does not trigger auto-fail (items present but incomplete vs fully absent).
decision_commentary: Strong SOW with correct commercial_hotel template. CH-004 (hydrologic setback compliance) is a TC-008-specific strength — directly addresses the stream constraint and CONAGUA obligations. Minor gaps: irrigation not explicitly addressed, contractor cost validation not formally planned, e-signature path not defined. These are improvable but not blocking.
celia_routing_notes: DG-04 routes to Bruno for itemized budget. All 11 payload fields present. route_to='Bruno' is correct per segment D flow.
